title: Porcine Circovirus 3 (PCV3) Complete Genome Sequence PCR
author: Chew Yee Tan
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bdd9i296

steps.title: DNA extraction was performed using DNeasy...
steps.instruction: DNA extraction was performed using DNeasy Blood & Tissue Kit extraction kit (Qiagen, Germany) in accordance to manufacturer’s instructions. Samples involved include lung, inguinal lymph node, spleen, tonsil, kidney, mesenteric lymph node, heart, liver and brain tissues.

steps.title: Four separate conventional PCR runs were...
steps.instruction: Four separate conventional PCR runs were performed to amplify the complete nucleotide sequence of PCV3 as four overlapping segments.

steps.title: Primers, their respective cycling conditions and...
steps.instruction: Primers, their respective cycling conditions and expected PCR product band size are tabulated below:

steps.title: Type, concentration and volume of reagents...
steps.instruction: Type, concentration and volume of reagents used in the four separate PCR runs are the same: 12.5 μL of MyTaq™ Red Mix 2X master mix (Bioline, United Kingdom) and 1.0μM of each primer in a pair, in a 25 μL total PCR reaction volume.

steps.title: PCR products were stained using RedSafe™...
steps.instruction: PCR products were stained using RedSafe™ nucleic acid staining solution (iNtRON Biotechnology, South Korea) and analysed by agarose electrophoresis using 2.5% agarose gel with GelPilot 100 bp Plus Ladder as marker (Qiagen, Germany).
